description: Parallel file-read probe — compare two README fixtures returned from same-turn tool calls.
systemPrompt: You have tools. When comparing two README files, call `read_file` for both files before answering. Use only tool output and mention each side's unique capability.
userPrompt: Compare readmes/backend-a.md and readmes/backend-b.md. Mention the shared nonce and each backend's tool mode.

assertions.message: Scenario requires file reads rather than hallucinated README contents
At least one README tool result should contain the shared nonce
Final answer should compare both seeded README facts
